stimulus: In most owl species, the male and female look nearly identical in size and color. ______blank snowy owls are different. They are one of the few owl species in which males and females display strikingly different plumage—males are almost pure white, while females have dark barring across their feathers.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. "However" logically signals that the claim about snowy owls in this sentence contrasts with the information about most owl species in the previous sentence.

Choice A is incorrect because "similarly" illogically signals similarity, when snowy owls are presented as different. Choice C is incorrect because "next" illogically signals a step in a process. Choice D is incorrect because "thus" illogically signals consequence; the claim contrasts with rather than follows from the previous information.
